title: Quarterly survey for Q2 (July to September) 2022 to 2023
body: "The Regulator of Social Housing publishes a quarterly survey four times a year. It sets out information such as the amount of borrowing registered providers have taken and where they got it from, the number of affordable home ownership homes they have built and sold, and the number of market sale homes they have built and sold.  The survey reports are available on the Quarterly survey collections page. "
